__ConnectionStrings_note: Local Postgres. The brief specified Port=5433, but the only running cluster on this machine is the PostgreSQL 18 service on Port=5432 (there is no 5433 instance). Set Port and Password to match your local instance before running — the Password below is a PLACEHOLDER, not the real DB credential.

Jwt.__comment: PLACEHOLDER signing key — fake but valid-shaped, 64 chars, local-only. NOT a real secret.

Email.__comment: PLACEHOLDER Mailtrap-shaped values — local-only, no mail is actually sent in this flow.

Admin.__comment: PLACEHOLDER seed-admin credentials — log in locally with these. NOT real credentials.
